milestoneTitle: Phase M9.16k — Chunk polish. (1) Doc-modal detection moved out of the iframe load handler — cross-origin pages can be briefly same-origin during navigation when load fires, producing false-positive 'blocked' flags; detection now runs only in a single 3s timer (was 1.5s) so any transition has settled. (2) Safe-area-inset-top padding added to .storage-modal-head and .backup-modal-head (previously only .tool-modal-header, .doc-modal-header). (3) Dead --accent token definition removed from :root (0 consumers after M9.16i).
